name: idle-party-rpg
description: Idle Party RPG with hexagonal world map

scripts.dev: concurrently --names server,client,admin -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev --workspace=server" "npm run dev --workspace=client" "npm run dev --workspace=game-manager"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=client && npm run build --workspace=server
